title: Make output ports with data type variables

features.name: output port with logic data type
features.description: Code should include an output port declaration with explicit logic data type (not var keyword), which should be treated as a variable not a net

features.name: output port with integral data type
features.description: Code should include an output port declaration with explicit integral data type (int, byte, etc), which should be treated as a variable not a net

features.name: output port with real data type
features.description: Code should include an output port declaration with real data type, which should be treated as a variable not a net

features.name: output port with string data type
features.description: Code should include an output port declaration with string data type, which should be treated as a variable not a net

features.name: output port with typedef data type
features.description: Code should include an output port declaration with a user-defined typedef type, which should be treated as a variable not a net
